title: Fix Memory Leak in Video Player
description: The HLS.js instance is not being properly destroyed on component unmount, causing heap usage to spike during navigation.

title: Implement Multi-Factor Auth
description: Add support for TOTP-based authentication using the speakeasy library and generate recovery codes for user backup.

title: Optimize Bar Chart Rendering
description: Re-render logic for SVG elements is triggering on every mouse move; implement React.memo and useMemo for performance.

title: Fix Race Condition in Search
description: Handle out-of-order API responses by implementing an AbortController to cancel previous requests when the query changes.

title: Integrate Real-time WebSockets
description: Connect the dashboard to the Binance API stream to update crypto prices every 100ms without refreshing the page.

title: Fix Safari Flexbox Gap Bug
description: The dashboard sidebar layout is breaking on Safari versions < 14.5; replace 'gap' with margin-based spacing for compatibility.

title: Patch SQL Injection Vulnerability
description: Sanitize user input in the transaction search bar by migrating raw queries to parameterized Knex.js statements.

title: Add Apple HealthKit Sync
description: Develop a background service to sync steps and heart rate data from wearable devices to the user profile.

title: Refactor Checkout Redirects
description: The middleware is currently performing redundant DB lookups on every redirect; implement Redis caching for session tokens.

title: Fix Map Cluster Overlap
description: Adjust the Google Maps clustering algorithm to prevent marker overlap when zoomed out at the continental level.

title: Automate Docker Image Cleanup
description: Write a cron job script to prune dangling images and volumes from the staging server every Friday at midnight.

title: Add Dark Mode Theme Toggle
description: Implement a CSS variable-based theme system and persist user preference in LocalStorage or Cookies.

title: Fix Image Upload Aspect Ratio
description: The profile picture uploader is distorting images; add a Canvas-based cropping tool to enforce a 1:1 ratio before upload.

title: Export Analytics to PDF
description: Use the Puppeteer library to generate a printable report of the monthly carbon footprint dashboard.

title: Update Leaderboard Pagination
description: The leaderboard currently loads all 5000 users at once; implement cursor-based pagination for faster load times.

title: Implement Biometric Login
description: Add WebAuthn API support to allow users to sign in using TouchID or FaceID on supported browsers.

title: Fix Markdown Parser Crash
description: The parser crashes when it encounters nested code blocks without closing backticks. Add error boundary handling.

title: Integrate Stripe Tax API
description: Automatically calculate and display regional sales tax during the hotel booking checkout process.

title: Add Chat Slow Mode
description: Develop a toggle for moderators to limit user message frequency during high-traffic live events.

title: Fix Form Validation Logic
description: The signup form allows submission even if the password field is empty; fix the Yup validation schema.

title: Implement Drag and Drop
description: Allow users to reorder their file folders on the dashboard using the dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd library.

title: Fix Bot Detection False Positives
description: Cloudflare is blocking legitimate mobile users; adjust the security level and add a custom 'Turnstile' widget.

title: Add Breaking News Banner
description: Create a high-priority notification banner that fetches live alerts from the headless CMS every 30 seconds.
